title: spergula fimbriata subvar. glabrifolia
intro: Spergula fimbriata subvar. glabrifolia is a plant species within the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly known as the spurry family, and is closely related to the garden spurrey plant. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its diuretic and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Spergula fimbriata subvar. glabrifolia include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to help with digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture for its herbal uses, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
